MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_07 
MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_08 
MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_09 
MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_10 
MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_11 
MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_12

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 0 = Not Medicare enrolled for the month 
1 = Part A only 
2 = Part B only 
3 = Part A and Part B 
A = Part A state buy-in 
B = Part B state buy-in 
C = Part A and Part B state buy-in 

COMMENT: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was entitled to
